case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. NATAN ALVES ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-11-2023 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210021768) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT ALVES, NATAN A/K/A NATAN R ALVES DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-15-2023

SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210021768) TO PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-10-2023 CONTINUED TO DEC-05-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 210021768) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK
DECLARATION RE DILIGENCE (TRANSACTION ID # 210025732) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-05-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
